title: Passport Application
content: To apply for a passport in India, visit Passport Seva Portal, register/login, fill application form, upload documents, pay fees, and book appointment. Required documents include Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, and Address Proof.

title: Driving License
content: To apply for a driving license, visit Parivahan portal, fill application form, upload learner license, book driving test slot, and pay fees. Required documents include Aadhaar Card and age proof.

title: PAN Card
content: To apply for PAN card, visit NSDL or UTIITSL portal, fill PAN application form, upload ID proof, address proof, and photograph.

title: Aadhaar Card Update
content: To update Aadhaar details, visit UIDAI portal or Aadhaar Seva Kendra. You can update address, phone number, biometric details, and name correction.

title: Voter ID Card
content: To apply for Voter ID, visit National Voters Service Portal (NVSP), register, fill Form 6, upload identity and address proof.

title: Ration Card
content: To apply for ration card, visit state food supply portal, submit family details, income proof, Aadhaar cards, and address proof.

title: Birth Certificate
content: To apply for birth certificate, visit municipal corporation portal or office, submit hospital records, parent ID proof, and application form.

title: Income Certificate
content: To apply for income certificate, visit state e-district portal, submit Aadhaar card, income proof, salary slip or affidavit.

title: Caste Certificate
content: To apply for caste certificate, visit e-district portal, submit Aadhaar card, address proof, family certificate, and community proof.

title: Domicile Certificate
content: To apply for domicile certificate, visit e-district portal, submit residence proof, Aadhaar card, electricity bill, and affidavit.

title: Marriage Certificate
content: To apply for marriage certificate, visit municipal portal, submit marriage proof, identity proofs of bride and groom, witness documents.

title: PM Kisan Scheme
content: PM Kisan provides financial support to eligible farmers. Apply through PM Kisan portal using Aadhaar and land ownership details.

title: Ayushman Bharat Scheme
content: Ayushman Bharat provides health insurance benefits to eligible families. Check eligibility using Aadhaar and ration card.

title: Startup India Registration
content: To register startup under Startup India, visit Startup India portal, submit company incorporation certificate and business details.
